message: SYSTEM ONLINE: Environmental sensors active. Beginning multi-year dive sequence.
WARNING: PENNATULOIDEA population has crashed.
CRITICAL: LEPTOGORGIA is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: EUGORGIA is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: BALTICINA is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: PTILOSARCUS is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: PENNATULOIDEA is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: ANTIPATHES is close to extinction!
ALERT: Major decline in overall fish biomass detected. System instability rising.
WARNING: LEPTOGORGIA population has crashed.
WARNING: EUGORGIA population has crashed.
WARNING: BALTICINA population has crashed.
WARNING: PTILOSARCUS population has crashed.
WARNING: PENNATULOIDEA population has crashed.
WARNING: ANTIPATHES population has crashed.
WARNING: PARAGORGIA population has crashed.
ALERT: El Niño conditions are accelerating habitat loss across the Channel Islands ecosystem.
WARNING: Residual thermal stress from the 2015-2016 El Niño persists. Elevated ocean temperatures are driving cold-water species out of surveyed ranges.
CRITICAL: PARAGORGIA is close to extinction!
WARNING: PLUMARELLA population has crashed.
WARNING: OCTOCORALLIA population has crashed.
WARNING: ANTIPATHES population has crashed.
CRITICAL: FLATFISH is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: SCULPIN is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: RATTAIL is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: COMBFISH is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: CATSHARK is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: ROCKFISH is close to extinction!
WARNING: FLATFISH population has crashed.
WARNING: COMBFISH population has crashed.
WARNING: ROCKFISH population has crashed.
CRITICAL: Survey gap detected — 2020 monitoring programs were suspended. Compounded by 2019-2020 Northeast Pacific marine heatwave. Species richness down 90% from 2019 peak.
WARNING: Marine heatwave residuals from 2019-2020 have restructured deep-water communities. Many cold-adapted species have not returned to surveyed areas.
WARNING: Black Coral and Bubblegum Coral reached bleaching threshold. Vitality dropping.
ALERT: Major decline in overall fish biomass detected. System instability rising.
WARNING: EUGORGIA population has crashed.
WARNING: PENNATULOIDEA population has crashed.
ALERT: Northeast Pacific marine heatwave detected. Thermal tolerance limits exceeded for multiple deep-water species in this region.
CRITICAL: PACIFIC HAKE is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: Widespread bleaching observed! Sea Whip Pen, Bright Sea Fan, Soft Coral and others are dying.
CRITICAL: GRENADIER is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: BLACKTIP POACHER is close to extinction!
CRITICAL: EELPOUT is close to extinction!

CRITICAL: CUSK EEL is close to extinction!
